description: Source list for RTO regulatory news monitoring. RSS preferred where available. HTML sources may be blocked by bot protection — those failures are expected and logged for manual review.

sources.name: ASQA News
sources.notes: Primary RTO regulator. Currently blocked by WAF — may fail until alternative access (email subscription) is added.

sources.name: Skills Insight
sources.notes: Jobs and Skills Council. Apex domain (no www) — confirmed via redirect resolution.

sources.name: ITECA News
sources.notes: Independent Tertiary Education Council. Working as of 2026-05-26.

sources.name: ASIC Newsroom
sources.notes: Working via underlying JSON API. Filter heavily — most ASIC news not RTO-relevant.

sources.name: TEQSA News
sources.notes: Higher ed regulator. Currently WAF-blocked — keep in list in case access improves.

sources.name: training.gov.au
sources.notes: JS-rendered SPA — currently inaccessible via curl. Keep in list pending Playwright option.

sources.name: DEWR Skills and Training
sources.notes: Currently WAF-blocked. Keep in list in case access improves.

sources.name: NCVER News
sources.notes: Cloudflare JS challenge — inaccessible via curl. Keep in list pending Playwright option.

sources.name: Home Affairs CRICOS
sources.notes: Original URL returns 404. Verify in browser and replace. Try: https://cricos.education.gov.au/ or https://www.education.gov.au/cricos
